### PR Workflow

We would encourage contributors to complete these steps in the order listed below:

-   [ ] Review the `Development Guide` within the [README](https://github.com/fanduel/wt#development-guide)
-   [ ] Fill in revert considerations section
-   [ ] Implementation complete with appropriate tests
-   [ ] Reviewed by appropriate team
-   [ ] Tested by appropriate QE process
-   [ ] Ready for release (only merge into master if intending to release)

## Revert considerations

_What is required to rollback your changes? What should be done and in what order_

e.g. Simple rollback to previous version
